what_it_does: Implements a global, subscription-based React store for the session-drill surface: it fetches and holds the list of Claude-Code sessions from /api/sessions, and fetches per-session recall lenses (catch_up, open_loops, directives) from /api/session-recall, exposing combined state through the useSessions hook.
observations: Maintains a single mutable module-level state object and a Set of subscriber callbacks.
useSessions registers a callback that increments a local React state counter to force re-renders.
ensureStarted auto-loads the session list once on the first hook mount.
loadSessions normalizes several possible response shapes (array, d.sessions, d.items) and fail-loud with a user-facing error message.
loadLens fetches three lens operations concurrently with a 4-second AbortController timeout and degrades cleanly to empty arrays on 404/empty/error.
Selected-session changes reset lens to null and trigger a fresh loadLens.
LENS_ROUTE is a local, unexported helper that builds /api/session-recall query URLs.
The store does not export a reset or clear function and keeps state in module scope.
standouts: Explicit contrast between fail-loud list loading and graceful per-lens degradation.
Concurrent fetch of three recall operations with per-op timeout and no fabricated fallback data.
routeReady flag documents whether the lens route is expected to be live.
conventions: Follows the ONE subscribe-store pattern (single fetch + single open-state shared by entry and panel).
Registry-is-truth: branches only on data-declared fields, not assumptions.
Fail-loud on list load with honest message + implicit retry via re-open.
Clean degradation for pending/unavailable lens route rather than guessed URLs.
concerns: Global mutable state persists for the module lifetime with no explicit reset/clear.
loadLens only checks superseded selection after all fetches complete; in-flight requests are not cancelled early.
loadSeq serial-number guard applies only to loadSessions, not loadLens.
Lens item arrays are cast without runtime validation (as LensItem[]).
No separate handling of AbortError versus other errors in fetchOp.
notes: A minimal subscription store that keeps the session list and per-session recall lenses in one place, preferring honest error states over silent empties.
questions: Which component mounts useSessions and binds the open/selected state to the UI?
Are the remaining lens ops (decisions, drift, timeline, find) intended to be fetched later?
What is the exact shape of /api/sessions when total differs from sessions.length?
How does the surface handle retry after a list-load error?
What is the 'DNA session-card organism' and where is it implemented?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file fetches and holds session list and per-session lens data, exposes it through a single subscription hook, and keeps rendering concerns out of the store.
apparent_themes: Single source of truth via module-level subscription store.
No fabricated data when routes are not yet live.
Composition: store holds data, host/card handles rendering.
intention_signals: The author is trying to replicate an existing store pattern faithfully while keeping the session-drill surface's data layer small, predictable, and honest about loading, errors, and pending backend routes.
novelty: The deliberate seam around LENS_ROUTE/routeReady and the asymmetric failure handling between the list (fail-loud) and the lenses (silent per-op degradation).
contribution: A concrete, file-local implementation of a subscription store that normalizes session-list responses, fetches core recall lenses concurrently with timeout, and surfaces honest loading/error/ready states for the session-drill surface.
summary_for_embedding: A React subscription store that loads a list of sessions from /api/sessions and per-session recall lenses from /api/session-recall, exposing combined state through useSessions.
intention_for_embedding: To provide the session-drill surface with a single, honest data layer that mirrors existing subscribe-store patterns and degrades cleanly around a pending lens route.

symbols.does: Type describing one session row returned by /api/sessions.
symbols.description: Defines id, name, cwd, state, last_activity, title, and seq fields used to render the session list.

symbols.does: Type for a single item inside a recall lens.
symbols.description: Optional line, ts, attr, kind, likely_resolved plus required text; shared across catch_up, open_loops, and directives.

symbols.does: Type for the per-session lens state held by the store.
symbols.description: Contains optional arrays for catch_up, open_loops, directives plus loading and routeReady flags.
Holds sessions, total, loading/error flags, open/selected UI state, and the current lens object.

symbols.does: Internal patch setter that replaces state and notifies subscribers.
symbols.description: Merges a partial update into the module-level state object and calls every registered subscriber callback.

symbols.does: Fetches and normalizes the session list from /api/sessions.
symbols.description: Sets loading/error, normalizes array/d.sessions/d.items shapes, maps fields to SessionRow, and uses a loadSeq guard against stale responses.

symbols.does: Builds the /api/session-recall URL for a session and operation.
symbols.description: Local helper that encodes the session id and op into the agreed query-string route; the single edit-point for the lens endpoint.

symbols.does: Fetches the three core recall lenses for a selected session.
symbols.description: Sets lens loading, concurrently requests catch_up/open_loops/directives with a 4s timeout, degrades each to an empty array on failure, and guards against superseded selections.

symbols.does: Opens the session-drill surface and loads the list.
symbols.description: Sets open true, selected null, and triggers loadSessions.
Sets open false; does not clear sessions or lens.

symbols.code_id: code://company/surface/app/src/sessions/sessionDrillStore.ts::selectSession | function | export function selectSession(id: string | null) {
symbols.does: Selects or deselects a session and loads its lens.
symbols.description: Updates selected id, clears lens, and calls loadLens when a non-null id is provided.

symbols.does: Auto-starts the session list load once.
symbols.description: Uses a module flag to call loadSessions only on the first hook mount.

symbols.does: React hook that subscribes components to the store state.
symbols.description: Registers a callback that increments a counter to force re-render, triggers ensureStarted, and removes the callback on unmount.
Forces the host component to re-render by bumping the local React state counter whenever the store notifies subscribers.
